forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon then turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely late this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north during the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Possible small hail in the south at night. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Hawker, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 45 km/h before turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 32.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Hawker, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely late this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly in the late afternoon then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southerly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, becoming less likely this afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy during the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting south to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek. Winds northwest to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 32 to 38.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 34.

Mostly sunny. The chance of raised dust north of Oodnadatta in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
Sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
